# hindclaw_api_key (Resource)

Manages a Hindclaw API key. The full key is only available at creation time.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hindclaw_api_key" "alice_key" {
  user_id     = "alice"
  description = "Primary API key"
}

output "api_key" {
  value     = hindclaw_api_key.alice_key.api_key
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `user_id` (String) User identifier.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Key description. Changing forces recreation.

### Read-Only

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Full API key (only available at creation, stored in state).
- `id` (String) Key identifier (computed by server).
